articles.title: India-born Nikhil Chaudhary called into Australia T20 squad
articles.description: Former Punjab allrounder Chaudhary replaces Travis Head for Bangladesh T20Is after three excellent seasons with Hurricanes in the BBL

articles.title: Women's T20 Asia Cup: Thailand, Hong Kong, Indonesia and UAE qualify
articles.description: The four teams won their respective quarter-finals at the ACC Women's Premier Cup to make the cut for the continental tournament

articles.title: Australia change NZ and Bangladesh schedules due to women's Champions Trophy
articles.description: New Zealand to tour twice in October and March due to February Champions Trophy while Bangladesh T20Is have been scrapped

articles.title: Ashwin sees 'no reason' why Kohli and Rohit shouldn't play 2027 ODI World Cup
articles.description: "Till you have experienced cricketers like Virat and Rohit, going for an away World Cup, you should extract as much experience as you can from those," Ashwin said

articles.title: Injured Hardik set to miss ODIs against Afghanistan; Rohit joins squad
articles.description: Hardik is understood to have suffered leg strain this week while training at the BCCI's Centre of Excellence in Bengaluru

articles.title: Stokes, Atkinson omitted from second Test as Root steps up as interim captain
articles.description: England name Jofra Archer and Jordan Cox in rejigged squad after nightclub incident

articles.title: Rana and Mosaddek star as Bangladesh end 21-year wait with crushing win
articles.description: Australia dropped four catches then lost early wickets in the chase before Nahid Rana's pace did the damage

articles.title: Suthar's debut six-for powers India to their biggest Test win
articles.description: After Suthar helped skittle Afghanistan for 152 in their first innings, Washington Sundar and Kuldeep Yadav sealed the win

articles.title: Tamim Iqbal elected new BCB president
articles.description: The former Bangladesh captain will serve a four-year term, having already completed two months as the president of an ad-hoc committee

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur exudes confidence ahead of Pakistan opener despite warm-up slip against England
articles.description: India’s final warm-up game turned out to be a thrilling, down-to-the-wire contest.

articles.title: PCB to review Shan Masood’s future as Test captain
articles.description: Pakistan’s defeat in Bangladesh has intensified scrutiny on Masood’s leadership, with the board expected to assess whether he should continue leading the Test side.

articles.title: ‘Cribbing about IPL and overseas players’ availability favorite pastime’ - Sunil Gavaskar hits back at IPL critics
articles.description: The debate gained momentum during and after the 2026 IPL season, particularly in England.

articles.title: Shaheen Afridi unhappy as Pakistan plans to rest him for West Indies and England Tests
articles.description: Pakistan are scheduled to play two Tests in the West Indies, beginning in Tarouba on July 25 and Port of Spain on August 2.
